tree.name: Kris Murray
tree.note: Iowa forward, drafted 23rd overall with NYK's 1st round pick acquired in 4-team Josh Hart trade (Feb 2023)

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Hart
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded CJ McCollum, Larry Nance Jr., and Tony Snell to NOP for Josh Hart, Nickeil Alexander-Walker, Didi Louzada, Tomas Satoransky, 2025 1st (NOP protected, rolled from 2022), 2026 2nd, and 2027 2nd (NOP own). Portland also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Villanova guard, acquired from New Orleans in CJ McCollum trade. Sent to NYK in 4-team trade (Feb 9, 2023) along with Dani Diez and Bojan Dubljevic for #23 pick (Murray), Cam Reddish, Arcidiacono, Thybulle, and trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: CJ McCollum
assetsGivenUp.note: Lehigh guard, drafted #10 overall by POR in 2013

assetsGivenUp.name: Larry Nance Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: POR traded Derrick Jones Jr. and a 2022 1st round draft pick (POR own, conditional, did not convey) to Chicago. Cleveland traded Larry Nance Jr. to Portland.
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward, acquired from Cleveland in 3-team Lauri Markkanen trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2022 1st, conditional, did not convey

assetsGivenUp.name: Tony Snell
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent by Portland

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick via POR
assetsGivenUp.note: POR own 2029 2nd, sent to PHI in 4-team Hart trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to CHA in 4-team Hart trade. More favorable.
